title.description: Title of the page showing the PREreviews of a dataset.

datasetDetails.description: Heading for the section with details of a dataset, such as its title and abstract.

authoredBy.description: Byline that shows the authors of the dataset.

abstractHeading.description: Heading for the abstract of the dataset.

posted.description: Label for the date that the dataset was posted.

repository.description: Label for the repository containing the dataset.

seeDataset.description: Text for a button that takes the user to the dataset.

prereviews.description: Heading for the section showing the dataset reviews.

writeAPrereview.description: Text for a button that takes the user to the page for writing a dataset review.

prereviewTitle.description: Title for a dataset review by a single author.

prereviewTitleInClub.description: Title for a dataset review by a single author in a club.

prereviewTitleMultipleAuthors.description: Title for a dataset review by multiple authors.

prereviewTitleMultipleAuthorsInClub.description: Title for a dataset review by multiple authors in a club.

otherAuthors.message: {number, plural, one {# other author} other {# other authors}}
otherAuthors.description: Text for the entry in the author list indicating the number of anonymous authors.

prereviewAuthoredBy.description: Byline that shows the author of a dataset review.

prereviewAuthoredByInClub.description: Byline that shows the authors of a dataset review in a club.

readPrereview.description: Text for the link that takes the user to a dataset review by a single author.

readPrereviewInClub.description: Text for the link that takes the user to a dataset review by a single author in a club.

readPrereviewMultipleAuthors.description: Text for the link that takes the user to a dataset review by multiple authors.

readPrereviewMultipleAuthorsInClub.message: Read <visuallyHidden>the PREreview by {author} et al. of {club}</visuallyHidden>
readPrereviewMultipleAuthorsInClub.description: Text for the link that takes the user to a dataset review by multiple authors in a club.
